/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/book_api.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/book_api.dir/controllers/BookController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/book_api.dir/repositories/BookRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/book_api.dir/services/BookService.cpp.o -o book_api  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libdrogon.1.9.12.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/sqlite3/lib/libsqlite3.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libtrantor.1.5.26.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libjsoncpp.dylib
